mapper.select: select (select count(1) from campus_merchant) as merchantCount, (select count(1) from campus_dish) as dishCount, (select count(1) from campus_package) as packageCount, (select count(1) from campus_activity) as activityCount, (select count(1) from campus_study_room) as studyRoomCount, (select count(1) from campus_order where status = 'PAID') as paidOrderCount, (select count(1) from campus_order where date(created_at) = curdate()) as todayOrderCount, (select count(1) from campus_reservation_record where status = 'BOOKED' and reservation_date = curdate()) as todayReservationCount
select id, name, canteen_name as canteenName, audit_status as auditStatus, recommended, logo_url as logoUrl from campus_merchant order by id desc limit 5
select id, title, location, status, start_time as startTime from campus_activity order by id desc limit 5

select o.id, o.item_name as itemName, o.total_amount as totalAmount, o.status, o.pay_channel as payChannel, o.created_at as createdAt, m.name as merchantName from campus_order o left join campus_merchant m on m.id = o.merchant_id order by o.id desc limit 5

select r.id, sr.name as studyRoomName, s.seat_code as seatCode, r.reservation_date as reservationDate, r.start_time as startTime, r.end_time as endTime, r.status from campus_reservation_record r left join campus_study_room sr on sr.id = r.study_room_id left join campus_seat s on s.id = r.seat_id order by r.id desc limit 5

select (select count(1) from campus_order where user_id = #{userId}) as orderCount, (select count(1) from campus_reservation_record where user_id = #{userId}) as reservationCount, (select count(1) from campus_activity_registration where user_id = #{userId}) as activitySignupCount
